## Summary
Describe what this PR changes and why.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Schematic change
- [ ] PCB layout change
- [ ] Library change (symbol/footprint/3D)
- [ ] Manufacturing output change
- [ ] Documentation / process change
- [ ] Other

## Links
- Issue(s): #
- Related docs: (link)

## Verification
- [ ] ERC passes
- [ ] DRC passes
- [ ] Outputs regenerated (Gerbers / Drill / BOM / PnP as applicable)
- [ ] External gerber/drill viewer sanity-check completed
- [ ] BOM reviewed (MPNs, alternates, DNP flags)
- [ ] Mechanical fit checked (outline/holes/keepouts/STEP as applicable)
- [ ] Test points/debug access reviewed

## Notes for Reviewers
Call out anything risky, tricky, or worth a closer look.

## Checklist (before merge)
- [ ] Title block revision/date updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Version/release notes updated (if applicable)
- [ ] No unintended library file changes
